step2.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3 at the lower part of the instrument panel.
Turn the engine switch on (IG) and turn the intelligent tester on.
Use the intelligent tester to check for DTCs, and note or print the result (see the operator's manual for operating instructions).
Confirm the details of the DTCs (See page ).
Operate the intelligent tester to clear the DTCs (see the operator's manual for operating instructions).
